summary: Frontend-only verification for Timur Design static landing page after the 3 user-reported fixes (services not WA-linked, email admin@, mobile perf optimizations). All 10 review-request checks PASS. Applied one minor fix: added missing `defer` attribute to the /assets/script.js tag in index.html (was the only structural perf optimization missing).

verification_results.services_cards_not_wa_links: PASS — #services-grid has 4 plain <div> children, 0 anchors, 0 wa.me links inside. Titles: Bangun & Renovasi Rumah, Jasa Arsitek, Desain Interior, Desain Eksterior & Fasad.
verification_results.email_changed_to_admin: PASS — No occurrence of 'halo@timurdesign.com' anywhere in HTML. JSON-LD line 55 and footer mailto (line 350) both use 'admin@timurdesign.com'. Only mailto link on page: mailto:admin@timurdesign.com.
verification_results.portfolio_webp_with_dimensions: PASS — All 6 portfolio images render as .webp (scandinavian, modern-tropis, villa, minimalis, mediterania, industrialis), each with explicit width=720 height=900 attributes. Files exist in /app/frontend/portfolio/.
verification_results.hero_responsive_srcset_webp: PASS — Hero uses srcset with 600w/900w/1280w/1600w/1920w, all fm=webp, width=1600 height=1067, fetchpriority=high, decoding=async. Image loads (naturalWidth=1920).
verification_results.perf_optimizations: PASS (after fix) — Google Fonts <link> uses media='print' onload="this.media='all'". /assets/styles.css has NO @import. <script src='/assets/script.js' defer> now has defer attribute (added during this test run).
verification_results.estimator_e2e: PASS — Submitting form with defaults (bangun_renovasi/Bali/100m²/1 lantai/menengah) renders: total Rp 566.700.000 – Rp 721.300.000, per m² Rp 5.667.000–Rp 7.213.000, durasi 4–6 bulan, 5-category breakdown, 8% savings vs market, 'Kirim Estimasi ke WhatsApp' button with valid wa.me URL containing the full estimate summary.
verification_results.faq_accordion: PASS — 5 .faq-toggle items. Clicking item #2 closes #1 and opens #2 (only one open at a time). aria-expanded states correct.
verification_results.floating_wa_scroll_visibility: PASS — opacity=0 at scrollY=0 (initial state from inline classes opacity-0/pointer-events-none/translate-y-4). After scrollTo(0,1200): opacity=1, opacity-100 class added. After scrollTo(0,0): opacity=0 again. Works correctly.
verification_results.mobile_smoke_test_390x844: PASS — Hero loads. Section counts: services=4, whyus=6, process=5, portfolio=6, testi=3, faq=5. Footer contains admin@timurdesign.com mailto, and all 4 cities (Bali/Surabaya/Malang/Pontianak) found.
verification_results.artikel_section_removed: PASS — No #artikel section in DOM. No nav/footer links containing text 'Artikel'.
verification_results.whatsapp_trigger_inventory: PASS — Exactly 5 wa.me triggers on initial load (outside Services grid): Hero 'Konsultasi Gratis', Portfolio 'Konsultasi Gaya Rumah', CTA 'Mulai Konsultasi Gratis', Footer 'Chat di WhatsApp', Floating bottom-right 'Konsultasi Gratis'. 6th 'Kirim Estimasi ke WhatsApp' appears after computing estimate. 0 inside #services-grid.

action_items: All 10 review-request checks now pass. Site is ready for user verification of actual PageSpeed score on production deployment.

Note: Hero image preload triggers a console warning ('preloaded but not used within a few seconds') — this is benign for desktop because preload media-query targets >=769px and the same URL is used by the srcset, but Chromium may still warn. Consider whether the preload is actually delivering value or can be dropped if PSI flags it.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero image preload (index.html line 35-36) uses media queries to switch between mobile/desktop preload URLs. Some browsers still warn 'preloaded but not used'. If LCP doesn't improve, consider removing the preload links — the alone may be sufficient.
Floating WA initial state relies on inline Tailwind classes (opacity-0, pointer-events-none, translate-y-4); script.js then toggles based on scroll. This pattern is correct and avoids FOUC.
JS file is 444 lines — borderline acceptable. If new features are added, consider splitting into modules (services.js, estimator.js, faq.js).
updated_files: /app/frontend/index.html (added 'defer' attribute to script tag at line 367)
seed_data_creation: None — pure static site, no DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully verified. All 3 user-reported bugs (services WA-link, email, perf structural fixes) are confirmed resolved. Actual PageSpeed Insights score must be re-measured by the user/main agent after deployment — structural enablers are all in place: WebP everywhere, lazy-loading on portfolio, fetchpriority=high on hero, defer on script, non-blocking font load, no @import in CSS, explicit width/height for CLS. There is no backend or API to test.
